params.colorPrimaries: One of the enumeration values specifying the CICP color primaries.
params.transferCharacteristics: One of the enumeration values specifying the CICP transfer function.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace" /> defined by the specified CICP primaries and transfer function, or <see langword="null" /> if the combination is not supported.
fields.summary: Creates a color space from CICP (Coding-Independent Code Points) color primaries and transfer function characteristics.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace CreateCicp (SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp colorPrimaries, SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp transferCharacteristics);
